mapper.select: SELECT st_asgeojson ( st_closestpoint ( st_geomfromgeojson ( #{contourOne} ), st_geomfromgeojson ( #{contourTwo} ) ) ) AS contourOne, st_asgeojson ( st_closestpoint ( st_geomfromgeojson ( #{contourTwo} ), st_geomfromgeojson ( #{contourOne} ) ) ) AS contourTwo
SELECT ST_Distance ( st_geomfromgeojson ( #{contourOne} ), st_geomfromgeojson ( #{contourTwo} ) ) AS minDistance

select annotation_id, area, perimeter, description, category_id, location_type, annotation_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, slide_id, json_id, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour) AS contour from fr_annotation_${sequenceNumber} where annotation_id = #{annotationId}

select.if: select ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Union((select contour40000 from fr_annotation where annotation_id = #{annotationId}),st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour}))) as contour
select ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Difference((select contour40000 from fr_annotation where annotation_id = #{annotationId}),st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour}))) as contour

mapper.select: select ST_Perimeter(st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour})) as perimeter, ST_Area(st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour})) as area
select count(*) from pg_class where relname = 'fr_ai_annotation_${sequenceNumber}'
SELECT n_live_tup FROM pg_stat_user_tables where schemaname = 'public' and relname = 'fr_ai_annotation_${sequenceNumber}'
mapper.insert: insert into fr_annotation_${sequenceNumber} ( area, perimeter, category_id, description, location_type, annotation_type, contour, create_by, slide_id, json_id, create_time )values( #{area}, #{perimeter}, #{categoryId}, #{description}, #{locationType}, #{annotationType}, st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour}), #{createBy}, #{slideId}, #{jsonId}, now() )
mapper.select:
select annotation_id, area, perimeter, description, category_id, location_type, annotation_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, slide_id, json_id, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour) as contour from fr_annotation_${sequenceNumber}
AND slide_id = #{slideId}
